mood: buried noise pressed into dark paper
lighting: low raking side flash across near-black paper, catching only ink thickness, sleeve rub, dust, cut edges, and dim amber source glints
object_inventory: oversized cropped letterform slabs treated as abstract architecture
two hero-scale dark sleeve interruptions embedded into the main vertical strokes
narrow seam lanes and curved edge cuts crossing the plate
small glossy defects and paper notches carrying source marks
compressed audio-image grains pressed into scuffed rectangles
negative_constraints: no legible words or readable typography inside the finished image
no music room, studio desk, dashboard, archive wall, gallery cards, shelves, cabinets, or realistic prop inventory
no bright software chrome, clean neon contrast, filenames, labels, callouts, or interface panels
do not copy the reference subject, logo, page chrome, or album cover text literally
avoid evenly spaced summary cards; anchors must be physical cuts, seams, grains, glints, or apertures in the sleeve surface
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
